Notes: ECAC Semifinals-Sophomore Kaitlyn Saunders (Windsor, CT/Northwest Catholic)
scored 21 points, including 10 of 10 from the line to lead Rensselaer to the
championship game.  Junior Caitlin Vestal (Harvard, MA/Bromfield) added 14 for
the Red Hawks.  Oneonta was paced by Marie Davey's (Amsterdam) 13 points.
Game.Officials: John McCaffrey,  Sharon Kowalski,  Kim Evans
